displayTitle: The Clone Wars S07E02: A Distant Echo
synopsis: On an unsanctioned mission to rescue the ARC Trooper Echo, General Skywalker, Captain Rex, and the Bad Batch travel travel to Skako Minor, headquarters of the Techno Union. After a harrowing encounter with the natives, our heroes infiltrate the city of Purkoll, only to find themselves surrounded by Wat Tambor’s forces.
title: The Clone Wars S07E02: A Distant Echo
